options.a: Relates to weather conditions such as snow, rain and drizzle; must be established before take-off and also the aircraft must be clean in accordance with the Aircraft Flight Manual.
options.b: Relates to weather conditions such as snow or rain; must be established before taxi and also the aircraft must be clean of contamination on the underside of the aircraft.
options.c: Relates to weather conditions such as snow, ice, slush or frost; must be established before push back and also the aircraft must be completely free of contamination.
options.d: Relates to weather conditions such as snow, ice, slush or frost; must be established before take-off and also the aircraft must be clean in accordance with the Aircraft Flight Manual.
